# Professional Networking Platform - MERN Stack

## Project Overview
A professional networking platform built with MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js.

## Features
- User authentication and profiles
- Professional connections/networking
- Posts and activity feed
- Real-time messaging with Socket.IO
- Job listings and applications

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React with Tailwind CSS and Heroicons
- Backend: Node.js with Express
- Database: MongoDB Atlas
- UI: Professional, responsive design

## Project Status
✅ Backend API created with Express and MongoDB models
✅ Frontend created with React and Tailwind CSS
✅ All dependencies installed
✅ Professional UI components implemented

## Next Steps
1. Configure MongoDB Atlas connection in `backend/.env`
2. Start backend server: `cd backend && npm run dev`
3. Start frontend server: `cd frontend && npm start`
4. Register a new account and start networking!

## MongoDB Atlas Setup Required
- Create account at https://www.mongodb.com/cloud/atlas
- Create a cluster and get connection string
- Update `backend/.env` with your MongoDB URI
- Whitelist your IP address in Atlas Network Access
